LAW AND MOTION 302, DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT - COLONIAL'S DEMURRER: - OVERRULE AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2, 3, 4, & 8. OVERRULE AS TO 5 BECAUSE AMENDED COMPLAINT HAS SUFFICIENT PARTICULARITY. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 6 BECAUSE REDUNDANT OF 4. OVERRULE AS TO 7. AMENDED COMPLAINT PLEADS OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT AND SEVERE EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. OVERRULE SPECIAL DEMURRER. COURT SEVERED WRONGFUL DEATH FROM OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. STEIER'S DEMURRER - SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 & 8. OVERRULE AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 7. REPORTER: PATRICIA EVEZICH

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-28-2002 Text Ruling
